description: cilia and flagella associated protein 418 [Source:HGNC Symbol;Acc:HGNC:27232]
ciliary_role: Mutations are associated with cone-rod dystrophy, retinitis pigmentosa (22177090) and Bardet Biedl syndrome (27008867). Studies suggest C8orf37 is involved with primary cilia function and implicated in the development of BBS (27008867).
ciliopathy_type: Bardet–Biedl Syndrome, Cone-Rod Dystrophy, Retinitis Pigmentosa
